name: Amon.sfcWindSouth30
title: Near-Surface Wind Speed
description: This is the mean of the speed, not the speed computed from the mean u and v components of wind
processing note:
normally, the the wind component should be reported at the 10 meter height
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Amon.sfcWindSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
